movie.synopsis: Chamak (2017) Movies Plot : Kush, a gynaecologist and a playboy refuses his family’s wishes to marry because his freedom will be curtailed if he marries. He later marries Khushi, an innocent girl while acting as if he is also an innocent guy in front of her family.
